  • Method Details

    • build

      public static CSVReader build(File source, String delimiter, boolean header) throws IOException
      Build a CSVReader with specific delimiter and presence or not of a header line. Encoding detection will be attempted.
      Parameters:
      source -
      delimiter -
      header - Does the file include a header line ?
      Returns:
      Throws:
      IOException

    • build

      headerRows -

      public static CSVReader build(File source, String encoding, String delimiter, Integer headerRows) throws IOException

      delimiter -
